Astrogem Full Pipeline: Time to Complete 24

How to Read This Table

Baseline

Score of your weakest equipped astrogem:
WP: (4−lvl)×2.1 | O/C: (lvl−4)×4.32 | AddDmg: lvl×1.65 | BossDmg: lvl×2.27 | ATK: lvl×1
New gems must exceed this score to be an upgrade.

Gem Cells

4 rows per cell: 2D (2 dmg stats) | Op (best 1 dmg) | Sub (worse 1 dmg) | No (0 dmg).
Each row: gold EV (left) and % above baseline (right).

Colors & Icons

Green (≥18k) — worth resetting if below BL (↻)
Yellow–Dim (>0) — worth cutting, not resetting
Red (≤0) — do not cut
Purple — fuse pre-cutting (NRB only)
↻ Reset if below BL (18k gold, one retry, same bucket).

Pipeline

Boxes — Which astrogem boxes to buy each week (if +EV).
Box EV — Expected gold value of a single random box gem.
Direct — Above-BL gems/week from cutting (includes resets).
Fusion — Above-BL gems/week from post-cut L/R/A fusion.
Total — Direct + Fusion. Total above-BL gems produced per week.
Weeks — 24 ÷ Total/wk. Estimated weeks to fill all 24 slots. ≤8 8–26 >26
Gold — Total gold/week = boxes + cutting + resets + fusing.
Avg Score — Expected average score of each of the 24 gems when complete.
Total Score — 24 × Avg Score − 2.1×6 − 4.32×6. Sum of all 24 gem scores minus base WP+Order contributions.

How to Use

Step 1: Decide on your gold per 1% damage. Refer to this video guide.

Step 2: Decide your baseline. Either use your total score or the weeks to complete to decide.

Step 3: Read the row. Each gem cell shows 4 bucket rows (2D, Op, Sub, No) with the expected gold value on the left and % chance to beat your baseline on the right. Red cells (EV ≤ 0) mean do not cut that gem — it’s not worth the gold. Purple cells mean you should fuse 3 of that gem before cutting — the fused output is worth more than cutting directly. Green cells with ↻ (EV ≥ 18k) mean if the gem lands below your baseline, pay 18k to reset and try again. Yellow/dim cells are worth cutting but not resetting. The pipeline columns on the right tell you how many above-baseline gems you’ll produce per week, how many weeks to complete all 24 slots, weekly gold cost, and expected final score.

Week estimate is based on vendor + dailies alone. Does not take into account paradise, events, or F4 shop.

500k gold / 1% damage
